content:
Position#Software Engineer Experience#During my internship at BENS Consultancy, I contributed to the development of a web application for a client. I was involved in the analysis, design, and development phases of the project. My responsibilities included creating use cases, domain models, and class diagrams using PlantUML, designing and developing web pages, and implementing application features.
I worked in an Agile/Scrum environment, gaining hands-on experience with Git, branching, pull requests, code reviews, and software architecture. I also expanded my knowledge of dependency injection and layered application architecture.
This internship provided valuable experience throughout the full software development lifecycle and strengthened my technical skills as a software developer.
title: BENS Consultancy, Zevenaar, Netherlands
